title: decision-record
description: Optional decision record (ADR-lite) used by the advisory 'context_alignment.decision_refs' field on completion cards. Required fields: schema_version, id, decision, rationale. All other fields are optional but recommended. This schema does NOT gate admission in safe V1; it only defines a stable shape for `xh decision record` output and for downstream reference resolution in follow-up slices.

id.description: Stable identifier (slug) for this decision. Referenced from completion cards via the optional top-level context_alignment.decision_refs array.

title.description: Short human-readable title for this decision.

date.description: ISO-8601 date the decision was recorded.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the decision. Mirrors the safe-V1 enum accepted by `xh decision record --status`.

decision.description: Plain-language statement of the decision that was made.

rationale.description: Reasoning behind the decision, including the options considered and the tradeoffs accepted.

context.description: Optional situational context (problem statement, prior state) that motivated the decision.

consequences.description: Optional description of the consequences of the decision (positive, negative, neutral).

superseded_by.description: Identifier of a later decision that supersedes this one. Use when status == superseded.

tags.description: Free-form tags for grouping or filtering decisions.

affected_paths.description: Optional list of source paths affected by this decision (advisory only; not enforced).

notes.description: Free-form notes (open questions, follow-up work, etc.).
